product_overview: DeadlineOS is a zero-setup, browser-only productivity OS that combines local task management, a Pomodoro-style focus timer, notes, and AI-powered analysis/chat with all data persisted to the user's device. The app runs from a set of static HTML pages and falls back to local smart-mock responses when the Anthropic API is unavailable.
core_goals: Provide a private, zero-setup productivity experience that stores all user data in the browser (localStorage).
Enable intelligent task prioritization and crisis detection via an in-browser AI Commander with optional user-provided API key.
Offer an integrated workflow: tasks, focus timer, notes and analytics in a single static-file app.
Gracefully degrade AI features with local mock responses when network or API keys are unavailable.

features.name: Site Navigation
features.description: Navigate between the marketing pages and open the in-browser DeadlineOS app from the landing site.
user_flows: Open / -> Click header navigation link 'Features' -> See /dos-features.html load
Open / -> Click header navigation link 'Demo' -> See /dos-demo.html load -> Click 'Open App' or 'Launch App' -> See /deadlineos-v3.html load
Open / -> Click header navigation link 'Pricing' -> See /dos-pricing.html load
Open / -> Click header navigation link that points to a missing page -> See /404.html load

features.name: Local Profile Login
features.description: Create PIN-protected local profiles, login to a profile, and keep all profile data on the device without server authentication.
user_flows: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click 'Create Profile' -> Fill profile name field -> Fill PIN field -> Click 'Save' -> See profile created confirmation -> Click profile -> Enter PIN -> Click 'Login' -> See app dashboard for that profile
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click 'Create Profile' -> Leave profile name blank -> Click 'Save' -> See validation error and profile is not created
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Select existing profile -> Enter incorrect PIN -> Click 'Login' -> See 'Invalid PIN' error message
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Create profile with a name that already exists -> Click 'Save' -> See duplicate-name validation error

features.name: Task Management
features.description: Add tasks with deadlines and priorities, mark tasks complete, change priorities, and delete tasks; tasks persist in localStorage.
user_flows: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Focus the task input field -> Type a task title -> Set deadline and priority controls -> Click 'Add Task' -> See the new task appear in the tasks list -> Click priority control on the task -> Change priority -> Click complete checkbox -> See task visually marked done -> Click delete button on the task -> Confirm deletion -> See task removed and localStorage updated
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click 'Add Task' with an empty title -> See validation error and task is not created
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Add a task -> Reload the page -> See the task persist from localStorage
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Attempt to delete a task -> Cancel the delete confirmation -> See task remains in the list

features.name: AI Commander (Chat/Analyze/Autoprioritize)
features.description: Open the AI overlay or chat, run Analyze or Auto-Prioritize actions, or use the AI chat; the app sends requests to Anthropic when a user API key is provided and otherwise falls back to a local smart-mock response.
user_flows: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Open the API key overlay -> Switch to 'Demo' tab -> Close overlay -> Click 'Analyze' -> Wait for AI processing -> See AI analysis output displayed in the UI
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Open AI Chat panel -> Type a message -> Click 'Send' -> See assistant reply appear in chat history

Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Open the API key overlay -> Switch to 'Own Key' tab -> Paste a valid Anthropic API key -> Click 'Save' -> Click 'Auto-Prioritize' -> App POSTs to https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages -> Receive AI response -> See tasks re-prioritized as suggested

Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Open the API key overlay -> Switch to 'Own Key' tab -> Paste an invalid API key or simulate network failure -> Click 'Save' -> Click 'Analyze' -> API call fails -> See fallback local smart-mock response or error toast indicating the network/API failure

features.name: Focus Timer
features.description: Run a Pomodoro-style focus timer, stop/reset sessions, and have completed focus sessions reflected in local session stats.
user_flows: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Open Focus Timer panel -> Click 'Start' -> Timer begins counting down -> Work until timer ends or click 'Stop' -> Click 'Save Session' if prompted -> See session added to local stats -> See session stats update in analytics
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Open Focus Timer panel -> Click 'Start' -> Click 'Reset' -> Timer resets to initial value -> See no session added to stats
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Click 'Start' while a timer is already running -> See 'Timer already running' warning and second start is prevented

features.name: Notes With AI Tools
features.description: Create and save notes locally, then run AI actions such as Summarize and Extract Tasks; when the Anthropic API is unavailable the app uses local fallback responses.
user_flows: Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Open Notes panel -> Click 'New Note' -> Type note content -> Click 'Save Note' -> See note appear in notes list and persist in localStorage -> Click 'Summarize' -> Wait for AI processing -> See summary displayed
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Open Notes panel -> Select a note -> Click 'Extract Tasks' -> See extracted tasks added to the task list and saved to localStorage

Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Open Notes panel -> Click 'Summarize' with no API key and simulate network failure -> API call fails -> App falls back to local smart-mock -> See fallback summary displayed
Navigate to /deadlineos-v3.html -> Open Notes panel -> Click 'Save Note' with empty content -> See validation error and note is not saved

tech_stack.other: Client-side localStorage persistence; optional Anthropic API integration (direct browser call)

routes.description: Marketing landing page with navigation to product pages and app
Marketing landing page with navigation to product pages and app
Product demo page linking to the in-browser app demo
Main in-browser app (tasks, AI chat, focus timer, notes, analytics) with local profiles

features.name: Site Navigation
features.description: Navigate between the landing page, product pages, and the in-browser app.
user_interactions: Click header navigation links to open product pages
Click "Open App" / "Launch App" to open deadlineos-v3.html

features.name: Local Profile Login
features.description: Choose or create a local profile and login with a PIN; data stays on the device.
user_interactions: Logout and re-login to the same profile

features.name: Task Management
features.description: Create, prioritize, complete, and delete tasks; tasks persist locally.
user_interactions: Add a task from the task input
Change task priority / mark task as done
Delete a task and see it removed

features.name: AI Commander (Chat/Analyze/Autoprioritize)
features.description: Use AI actions (Analyze, Chat, Auto-Prioritize). Without an API key it falls back to a local smart-mock response.
user_interactions: Open the API key overlay and switch between Demo and Own Key tabs
Run Analyze / Auto-Prioritize and see an AI response
Send a chat message and see assistant replies

features.name: Focus Timer
features.description: Run a Pomodoro-style focus timer and track focus sessions locally.
user_interactions: Start and stop the focus timer

features.name: Notes With AI Tools
features.description: Write notes and use AI actions (summarize/extract tasks/improve). Without an API key it uses a local fallback response.
user_interactions: Run Summarize and see the output
Run Extract Tasks and see extracted tasks

known_limitations.issue: No backend persistence; all user data is stored in localStorage only.
known_limitations.impact: Data is device/browser-specific and can be lost if browser storage is cleared.

known_limitations.issue: Direct browser calls to Anthropic API require a user-provided API key and may be blocked by browser/network policies; app falls back to mock responses when unavailable.
known_limitations.impact: Real AI responses may not work in all environments; fallback behavior should be tested.
